title: Cyber Ninja
original_title: 未来忍者 慶雲機忍外伝
overview: In a futuristic version of medieval Japan, a band of swordsmen battles an evil warlord and his mechanical army of ninjas, and are aided by a mysterious heroic cyborg ninja, Shiranui.
